apps.name: Unleashed
apps.subtitle: Flipper Zero BLE companion
apps.localizedDescription: Native companion for Flipper Zero on tumoflip/Unleashed firmware. Files & folder upload, screen mirror + remote, Sub-GHz TX and NFC/RFID emulate via the companion .fap, Sber relay failsafe (HA -> Sber cloud), Marauder log analysis, and an all-the-plugins auto-updater.
apps.versionDescription: First Feather-distributed build. App Updates tab (all-the-plugins), protected apps, install history, installed-apps viewer, versioned app name.
